def negative_pytest_raises_without_match_parameter_on_broad_exception():
    rule_id = "pytest_raises_without_match_parameter_on_broad_exception"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "pytest.raises used with a broad exception type without a match= pattern to verify the message."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
